mapper.select:
select (@i:=@i+1) as orderNumber, id as question_id, question_name, question_type, answerA, answerB, answerC, answerD, answerE, answerF, right_answers from xm_course_question, (select @i:=0) t where is_delete = 0
and 1 = 0
and id in
#{item}

SELECT topic_type, IFNULL(topic_num, 0) AS topic_num, IFNULL(topic_score, 0) AS topic_score FROM xm_project_test_paper_tactics WHERE is_delete = 0 AND topic_num IS NOT NULL AND topic_score IS NOT NULL AND project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY topic_type

SELECT id as question_id, question_name, question_type, answerA, answerB, answerC, answerD, answerE, answerF FROM xm_course_question WHERE is_delete = 0 AND course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY question_id
SELECT id as question_id, question_name, question_type, answerA, answerB, answerC, answerD, answerE, answerF, right_answers FROM xm_course_question WHERE id = #{id}
